reason: This is a general social commentary about relationships between boys and girls, stating that people who have many opposite-gender friends lose respect from potential romantic interests. Contains no ISIS-related content or extremist ideology.
original_post: البنت اللي حياتها كلها ولاد هتفقد احترام اي ولد معجب بيها،والولد اللي حياته كلها بنات هيفقد احترام اي بنت معجبه بيه.👌👍
